purpose: Git pre-commit hook that blocks commits when the manifest has drifted from reality by running devtools check and aborting if any manifest tool binary is missing.
called_by: git (via core.hooksPath = hooks, set by bootstrap.sh)
invariants: Exits 0 only when devtools check reports all manifest tools present
Exits 1 (blocking the commit) when any manifest tool is missing
Self-locating: resolves REPO_ROOT from the hook's real path
gotchas: bootstrap.sh sets git core.hooksPath to $REPO_ROOT/hooks — without this configuration the hook is ignored
If a tool is intentionally removed from the system but not from the manifest, every commit will be blocked until manifest/tools.json is updated via bootstrap.sh
